Vermilion Sky Ring  
 

Lore Item No Trade
Slot: FINGER
Charges: 2
AC: 5
DEX: +3 WIS: +7
SV DISEASE: +20
Effect: Feign Death (Any Slot/Can Equip, Casting Time: Instant) at Level 45
WT: 2.0 Size: MEDIUM
Class: SHM
Race: ALL
Vermilion Sky Ring
Lore Item No Trade
Slot: FINGER
Charges: 2
AC: 5
DEX: +3 WIS: +7
SV DISEASE: +20
Effect: Feign Death (Any Slot/Can Equip, Casting Time: Instant) at Level 45
WT: 2.0 Size: MEDIUM
Class: SHM
Race: ALL

Item Type:Armor
Stackable:No
Lucy Entry By:Etty
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2022-01-15 18:42:57
Page Updated:Sun Jul 26th, 2020

Expansion: Original
Rarity: Common
Level to Attain: 50
[Recipes | Comments ]

This item is the result of a quest.
Expansion List - Premium only.
Quest Name
Shaman Test of the Snake
Crafted: This item is crafted by players.
  • Vermilion Sky Ring (Non-Tradeskill)
    • Class: ALL
    Expansion: Original
    Yield: 1 x Vermilion Sky Ring
Used in 1 recipe.
Recipe list - Premium only.

Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Plane of Sky
Formally known as the "Crimson Ring of Desinence."

Can be recharged by combining with Mana Battery - Class Five in Box of the Void.



Uploaded March 27th, 2023 by iventheassassin
Send a correction

Fallen to the Ground
QuoteReply
# Mar 04 2021 at 9:46 PM Rating: Decent
boringboneguy
Scholar
19 posts
Don't know if this has been covered, but you can fall to the ground with this ring. Has only happened once in about 20 uses, but it can happen. Be aware.
▲ Page top
Fallen to the Ground
QuoteReply
# Mar 06 2021 at 12:01 PM Rating: Excellent
Gidono
View User Forum
Moderator
6,835 posts
boringboneguy wrote:
Don't know if this has been covered, but you can fall to the ground with this ring. Has only happened once in about 20 uses, but it can happen. Be aware.


Make sure if you use this ring to use it near some soft ground. Monks have broken hips many times.

▲ Page top
Sham FD Ring
QuoteReply
# Jan 13 2012 at 4:03 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592793005067
1 post
Still do able. I know I am a slacker but got it today.

I did it with my two alts and mercs. Left druid on bee island to hail and I and monk were in room. Took me 12 kills to get ring drop and monk lived thru DT 50% of the time with full buffs, growth, and epic clicked. Only reason I say he live is it does save time if you are boxing this quest.

The long hard part was getting my two alts keyed for all the islands.
▲ Page top
Still Dropping
QuoteReply
# Jan 11 2011 at 6:40 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592763250537
8 posts
Just wanted to post that indeed this item is still obtainable. I just finished it 1 / 10 / 11.
the Emerald Feather is the easiest drop to get by far.
The Ring took about 30 spawns of the Sister.
The rarest one for me was the Bixxie Essence as it only appears to drop off of the Tiny bixxie bee Bzzzt.

She will only spawn from the bee closest to the gear, in the center. She is the one you kill right before the DTing boss bee spawns.

[EDIT] ANY of the bees can drop the essence. I had 2 drop today 6/1/11 off random trash spawns...

Little note.

This is indeed instant FD and I have yet to have it fail.
This IS rechargable as people have stated before but, The Box you get in PoSky is LORE and gets consumed in the recharge.
No big deal as it's only a plat but you cant stock up on them so you have to go to the plane to get another after recharging. I always carry one on me with a full charged ring. Giving me 4 FD's before I have to return to Sky.

If anyone has any questions on this quest, please feel free to contact me here, Ryjalcliffwalker@hotmail.com or in game on Bertox on Learoy/Ryjal.

Happy hunting and good luck. Ring is definately worth the pain it is to get.

Edited, Jun 1st 2011 8:57pm by Ryjal
▲ Page top
Great item!
QuoteReply
# Oct 25 2009 at 5:18 AM Rating: Decent
Sippin
Sage
3,058 posts
Great item and not so much to avoid real death, since death in EQ isn't such a big deal anymore. It's great because shamans can rez. Trying to get a group to a real tough camp deep inside a zone... cleric casts DA on the shaman, shaman drags a mage to the camp spot. Feign off any mobs, clear aggro, stand and rez the mage. CoH rest of the group.

If no mage, shaman drags 2 corpses, rezzes them both and lays down campfire.

This ring is invaluable for the same reason that guilds used to pay 1million pp (back when 1million pp was real money!) for that 10-charge rez stick. We'd keep it as a guild asset and loan it to a monk who would do the same kind of thing.

The only class that can innately do this is the necro and since their feign is a spell and not strictly speaking insta-cast, there's a significant chance of failure with necros. At least I seem to remember more than one occasion where an entire raid got delayed because of a necro's FD spell failing during such a situation.

There should be a quest for a monk to get a rez-ring with 2 charges!

That's one thing I love about EQ... these obscure "out of nowhere" quests which most people don't know about. I knew about this one but totally forgot it until I noticed a reference to it in a "druid vs shaman" post somewhere. Yeah, I wish my druid could get a rez-ring or a FD-ring...

Edited, Oct 25th 2009 7:20am by Sippin
____________________________
Sippin 115 DRU **** Firiona Vie ****Agnarr
FV: 115 WAR ENC CLE MAG WIZ SHD SHM Master Alchemist ROG Master Tinkerer & Poison-Maker
Master Artisan (300+) * Baker * Brewer * Fletcher * Jeweler * Potter * Researcher * Smith * Tailor
Agnarr: 65 DRU ENC SHD MAG CLE ROG WIZ BRD WAR PAL BST RNG MNK
▲ Page top
30 kills tonight and it dropped
QuoteReply
# Apr 09 2008 at 9:15 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591868569718
View User Forum
21 posts
april 3 2008

set a fire on bee island.. dont kill them unless u need a key ... go upto next island and kill all the drakes... we killed all the big bird mobs on the tempo.. and yes they all dt.. so use exp recovery... then go inside tempo and look up and kill the 5-8 little yellow bixxi looking things.. then take fire down the bee island... kill all the bees and the main one (he dt's)... leave one person or alt down on the bee island to talk to the little guy to spawn the sister... u need to say... llaw eht eno ma i ..... yes just like that to spawn the sister... the rest go up and stand on ramp on the next island... spawn it someone will need to tag and take dt.. second life saved me a couple of times.. dont bother looting your corpse... get a rez spawn it again... and again.. u are on a timer and will only spawn it about 10-20 times in that 5 mins or so.. then the little guy on the island below will despawn...

but before u spawn it again... have a monk or bard train the NEW little guy off that will spawn in the tempo where the sister was... if u dont he will argo u...

we did this today and killed it 15 times about.. and no ring dropped..








dropped today 4-10-08

there was 3 of u us just eating the dt to rapid spawn it today... we had about 30 kills and one ring dropped...


the turn in mob... u will have to get another port up... then u buy the key Veeshan's Key from the same guy u buy the first 2 from... and yes the veeshan key is DIFFERENT from the one u get on the last island... hold it in your cursor and go click all the portal things untill one take u to a room with 20 task givers in it... go in and turn right u will find Medicine Man Veetra is up, you say "I choose Ooga" to get the actual quest mob to spawn. once u say that he will give u a book.. give it back to him for ooga to spawn... then turn the 3 items in .. thats it ..

make sure u buy the box from the key guy also and some class 5 bat for recharging... not sure if u need a box each time or if that one will be saved after each charging...

ty to my friends for helping me Destor, Ragz, Sheebangs, Jessex ... some of nsl nices people

Edited, Apr 10th 2008 1:17am by canudie

Gazz been selling this for a while now for 1.5 million plat. Nice item, hope the mana batteries in sky are not lore, otherwise this would be a small pain to recharge.
▲ Page top
RE: coo
QuoteReply
# May 10 2006 at 7:46 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592254696143
Scholar
62 posts
Mana batteries are not lore, but the pain is the Box of the Void is. This is the box you combine the used up ring and the batterie. So recharging it can be costly, 50pp for the batterie, 105 pp for he port to sky stone, and how ever much you tipt a wizard have his buffs striped.

You can recharge it using the mana batteries sold in Sky. Its not meant to be used as much as monks/sk/necros use it. Its nice in a big emergency.

It, and other items form PoS (an perfect name for the zone), can indeed be recharged. I have the mantle and have recharged it. The mantle's effect is kinda nice in emergencies as well. I have used it to keep a mob busy while I made an escape.
